full_text:
Noble Lady Li 李貴人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Noble Lady Li (李貴人). One of those who Cao Pi preferred over Empress Zhen. Told Cao Rui whose slander had killed his mother. Noble Lady Li was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
